title: Kardia Lexicon Verse Index Entry
description: Translation-independent verse tagging. No translation text stored.

verse_ref.description: OSIS standard verse reference. Examples: GEN.1.1, PS.23.1, 1JN.4.8

source_text.description: Which original language text the word positions reference.

original_word.description: Transliterated original language word at this position.

strongs_id.description: Strong's ID. Used by app to resolve to English word via interlinear alignment.

word_position.description: 1-indexed position of this word in the original language verse.

hebrew_category_id.description: Foreign key into categories.json. What fires when user taps this word.

context_note.description: Optional verse-specific note if category application needs contextual nuance.
